home.demoAlertDescription: You are currently viewing the demo version. No actual connection to the automaton.
home.orderProcessingDescription: The automaton is dispensing your order. Please wait...
home.magazineEmptyDuringProcessing: A magazine became empty during processing. Please change the magazine and confirm.
home.magazineChangeWaitStart: A magazine must be changed. Press the button on the machine to start the magazine change.
home.magazineChangeCalibrating: Magazine change in progress (calibrating)… please wait.
home.standaloneMagazineChangeBodyWaitStart: The machine is waiting for the magazine change to start. Press the button on the machine, or use “Start change”.
home.standaloneMagazineChangeBodyConfirm: The machine is waiting for confirmation. Insert the magazine and confirm.
home.pickupWaitingDescription: Order is ready for pickup. Please remove it from the automaton and confirm (press button).
home.automatDisconnectedBeforeLink: The automaton is not reachable. You can still try the
home.quickMagazineChangeHint: At least one magazine change will be necessary during the order.

orderForm.title: New Order
orderForm.subtitle: Select the desired components
orderForm.selectAtLeastOne: Please select at least one component.
orderForm.magazineChangeIntro: This order requires a magazine change during picking.

inventory.title: Inventory Management
inventory.warningTooHigh: Warning level cannot be higher than total stock!
inventory.maxOrderQuantityOutOfRange: Maximum order quantity must be between 1 and {max} (number of magazines)!
inventory.magazineChangeDisabled: Automaton not connected - magazine change disabled
inventory.forceMagazineChangeWarning: ⚠️ Only trigger if the magazine is already empty. Remove the magazine first, then confirm here. The automaton will start calibration afterwards.
inventory.forceMagazineChangeSuccess: Magazine change started – please insert new magazine
inventory.forceMagazineChangeBlockedPickup: Magazine change is not available while waiting for pickup.
inventory.forceMagazineChangeBlockedOrderFlow: Quick change here is not available during an active order or while the magazine change dialog is shown.
inventory.magazineChangeConfirm: The active magazine will be refilled to {size} pieces ({component}).
inventory.magazineChangeModalBase: The active magazine will be refilled to {size} pieces ({component})
inventory.inventurInstruction: Enter the number of all loose pieces and select how many additional full magazines are available. The total stock will be calculated (including current magazines in the automaton).
inventory.activeMagazineTooltip: Fill level of the active magazine
inventory.totalStockTooltip: Total inventory: stock in physical storage + fill level of magazines
inventory.warningStockTooltip: When total stock falls below this value, an orange warning appears. When only half of this value is in storage, a red warning appears.
inventory.magazineTooltip: Number of exchangeable magazines × pieces per magazine
inventory.maxOrderTooltip: Maximum number of magazines per order.

adminPage.loggedOutInactivity: You were automatically logged out after 15 minutes of inactivity
adminPage.autoLogoutWarning: Automatically logged out after 15 minutes of inactivity
adminPage.demoAlertDescription: You are currently viewing the demo version. Changes will not be saved.

adminSettings.title: Settings
adminSettings.magazineSwitchTitle: Magazine change button on order page
adminSettings.magazineSwitchDescription: Displays the magazine change button on the order page

componentsDisplay.refillDisabled: No connection to automaton: Refill disabled.
componentsDisplay.disconnectedRefillHint: Note: No connection to automaton. "Change" will still update the software stock (magazine) – this is useful if you've also changed the cartridge without a connection.
